title: Bhimashankar Temple
tagline: Bhimashankar Temple — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: Bhimashankar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva situated in its eponymous village, Bhimashankar, in Pune district of Maharashtra.
overview.description: Bhimashankar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva situated in its eponymous village, Bhimashankar, in Pune district of Maharashtra. It is a key pilgrimage centre and contains one of the 12 Jyotirlingas. The temple's Shiva lingam is one of the three Jyotirlingas of Maharashtra. The mandir is situated on a mountain, 110 kilometers away from Pune.

topPlaces.name: Bhimashankar Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Bhimashankar Wildlife Sanctuary was created in the Ambegaon and Khed talukas of Pune District, in the Western Indian state of Maharashtra in order mainly to protect the habitat of the Indian Giant Squirrel. It spreads through 3 districts of Maharashtra; Pune District, Raigad District and Thane District.

topPlaces.name: Ambivali Caves
topPlaces.description: The Ambivali Caves, or Ambivali Leni, are a group of Buddhist caves near Neral, Raigad district, Maharashtra, 8km southeast of Kalyan. The caves are cut in the low hill located on the concave portion of a river.

items.note: Bhimashankar Wildlife Sanctuary was created in the Ambegaon and Khed talukas of Pune District, in the Western Indian state of Maharashtra in order mainly to protect the habitat of the Indian Giant Squirrel. It spreads through 3 districts of Maharashtra; Pune District, Raigad District and Thane District.

The Ambivali Caves, or Ambivali Leni, are a group of Buddhist caves near Neral, Raigad district, Maharashtra, 8km southeast of Kalyan. The caves are cut in the low hill located on the concave portion of a river.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhimashankar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhimashankar Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bhimashankar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (68 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (47 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhimashankar Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhimashankar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhimashankar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Bhimashankar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhimashankar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bhimashankar Wildlife Sanctuary, Ambivali Caves.
